name: NINPOU: KAGEMUKU GENJUTSU NO WAZA (NINJA ART: DOUBLE-LAYERED METHOD OF GENJUTSU)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Phantasm)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 3

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, S

You place a genjutsu effect upon the subject, locking a single genjutsu effect it is already affected by with a kagemuku. When a creature or effect tries to dispel the original effect, it instead dispels a single kagemuku, if one is present and bound to it. A single effect can have up to five separate kagemuku affecting it, but each application beyond the first costs 2 additional Chakra, and decreases the dispel DC of all kagemuku tied to the same effect by 1.

Once per day, you can use this technique as an instant action immediately after performing a Genjutsu technique on a creature, targeting the same creature.

Mastery: The second and fourth step allow you to use this technique as an instant action one additional time per day.
